example: I go to school by bus every day.
I take the bus to school every morning.
I travel on foot when the weather is nice.
Motorbikes are convenient and fast in the city.

vietnamese: đông đúc vào giờ cao điểm
example: Buses are pretty crowded at rush hours.

vietnamese: cảm thấy thoải mái và thư giãn
example: On the bus, I feel comfortable and can read books.

vietnamese: ít tai nạn hơn / an toàn hơn
example: Travelling by train is safer and has fewer accidents.

word: run slowly / be in bad conditions
vietnamese: chạy chậm / trong tình trạng xấu
example: Public buses run slowly because the roads are in bad conditions.
